parts.text: Use the light bank path on ${LEDGR_TEST_DOC_DIR}/Cast Unity/Orange Perspective Consulting Pte. Ltd./BankStatement/FY2025/Oct2025_MariBank_Business_e-Statement.pdf: call read_bank_statement with paths=["${LEDGR_TEST_DOC_DIR}/Cast Unity/Orange Perspective Consulting Pte. Ltd./BankStatement/FY2025/Oct2025_MariBank_Business_e-Statement.pdf"], then project_bank_workbook. Summarize sheet titles, transaction row counts per sheet, extract_mode, and reconciled status.

Use the light bank path on tests/fixtures/bank_multi_ccy_digital.pdf: call read_bank_statement with paths=["tests/fixtures/bank_multi_ccy_digital.pdf"], then project_bank_workbook. Summarize sheet titles, account_count, and currencies.
